summary: Iteration 81 - Payment-to-Session Handshake Fix Verified. The posts.media_url column was changed from VARCHAR(500) to TEXT to support base64 selfie images. All 4 features tested and PASSED.

posts_media_url_column_is_text.details: posts.media_url column is now TEXT type (not VARCHAR 500)

posts_thumbnail_url_column_is_text.details: posts.thumbnail_url column is also TEXT type

join_session_accepts_large_selfie.test_method: E2E API test with 6022-char base64 selfie

participant_record_stores_selfie.details: LiveSessionParticipant record stores full base64 selfie_url (6022 chars)

check_in_post_created_with_selfie.details: Post created with media_type='check_in', media_url contains full base64 (6022 chars), visible in /api/posts endpoint

root_cause_analysis.original_issue: Payment-to-Session Handshake Failure - 'Failed to join session' error after card entry
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: posts.media_url column was VARCHAR(500) but the join_session endpoint creates a check-in Post with media_url=selfie_url. Base64 selfie images exceed 500 characters, causing database insertion failure.
root_cause_analysis.fix_applied: Changed posts.media_url and thumbnail_url from String(500) to Text in models.py (line 546-548). Migration script /app/backend/migrations/fix_posts_media_url_column.py applied to alter columns to TEXT.
root_cause_analysis.verification: Successfully stored a 6022-character base64 selfie in both live_session_participants.selfie_url and posts.media_url

critical_code_review_comments: models.py line 546: media_url = Column(Text, nullable=True) - correctly changed to Text
models.py line 548: thumbnail_url = Column(Text, nullable=True) - correctly changed to Text
models.py line 720: LiveSessionParticipant.selfie_url = Column(Text, nullable=True) - correctly uses Text
seed_data_creation: Created test surfer user: test_selfie_surfer@test.com with 100 credits
context_for_next_testing_agent: The VARCHAR(500) to TEXT migration for posts.media_url has been verified. The join session flow now correctly stores base64 selfie images. Test user 'test_selfie_surfer@test.com' has successfully joined a session with a base64 selfie.
